name: IRC_MP_SITE_CONFIG_VL
query: SELECT B.SITE_CONFIG_ID, B.SITE_CODE, B.SITE_TYPE, TL.SITE_NAME, B.ELIGIBILITY_OBJECT_ID, B.ELIGIBILITY_PROFILE_ID, B.STATUS_CODE, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.SEQUENCE_ORDER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM IRC_MP_SITE_CONFIG_B B, IRC_MP_SITE_CONFIG_TL TL WHERE B.SITE_CONFIG_ID = TL.SITE_CONFIG_ID AND TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
